Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has early burst. Play defensive and use W to farm safely.
Naafiri.ability_to_dodge: Naafiri Q (Darkin Salvo) — step to the side or back.
Naafiri.early_game: Play safe pre-6. Naafiri wins early all-ins.
Naafiri.mid_game: Use ult to steal her abilities. Group with team.
Naafiri.late_game: You outscale. Use stolen ults effectively.
Naafiri.win_condition: Steal key ultimates and use them in teamfights.
Naafiri.scaling: Sylas outscales — your ult versatility grows
Naafiri.positioning: Keep distance early. Use W to farm safely.

Graves.trading_pattern: Graves has early burst. Play defensive and use W to farm.
Graves.ability_to_dodge: Graves Q (End and Beginning) — dodge by stepping back.
Graves.mid_game: Use ult defensively. Scale with team.
Graves.win_condition: Steal his ult and use it in fights.
Graves.positioning: Keep distance with W. Never close range early.

Veigar.trading_pattern: Veigar stacks power. Trade early before stacks accumulate.
Veigar.early_game: Abuse before stacks. Poke with Q.
Veigar.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Don't fight in cage.
Veigar.late_game: He outscales. Use stolen ults effectively.
Veigar.win_condition: Steal and use his powerful ult.
Veigar.scaling: Veigar outscales — his stacking makes him stronger
Veigar.positioning: Avoid his cage range. Close distance when safe.

Viktor.trading_pattern: Viktor has good early E poke. Trade when cooldowns are down.
Viktor.early_game: Play defensively. Viktor has decent poke.
Viktor.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Viktor.win_condition: Steal his powerful ult and use it.
Viktor.scaling: Viktor outscales — his itemization is superior
Viktor.positioning: Keep distance with W. Avoid E zones.

Vex.trading_pattern: Vex has poke and CC. Trade when abilities are down.
Vex.mid_game: Use ult to steal hers. Scale with team.
Vex.win_condition: Steal her ult and use it in fights.
Vex.scaling: Sylas slightly favored — ult versatility is higher
Vex.positioning: Keep distance. Use W to trade safely.

Lissandra.trading_pattern: Lissandra has CC and crowd control. Trade when cooldowns down.
Lissandra.ability_to_dodge: Lissandra E (Glacial Path) — dodge by moving away.
Lissandra.early_game: Play defensively. Lissandra has good CC.
Lissandra.mid_game: Use ult to steal her ult. Scale with team.
Lissandra.scaling: Lissandra slightly favored — her CC scales well
Lissandra.positioning: Keep distance with W. Avoid her combo range.

Xerath.trading_pattern: Xerath outranges you. Play defensive with W.
Xerath.early_game: Play very safe. His range is overwhelming.
Xerath.mid_game: Use E to close distance. Scale with team.
Xerath.win_condition: Close distance with E and use stolen ults.
Xerath.scaling: Xerath outscales — his poke range is oppressive
Xerath.positioning: Keep distance. Use minions for cover.

Akshan.trading_pattern: Akshan has mobility and poke. Trade when abilities down.
Akshan.ability_to_dodge: Akshan E (Grappling Hook) — step back when he grapples.
Akshan.early_game: Play defensively. Akshan has decent poke.
Akshan.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Akshan.win_condition: Steal his ult and use it.
Akshan.scaling: Sylas slightly favored — ult versatility is higher
Akshan.positioning: Keep distance. Close when he overextends.

Diana.trading_pattern: Diana is melee. Trade when her abilities are down.
Diana.early_game: Trade when she's vulnerable. Both scale.
Diana.mid_game: Use ult to steal hers. Scale with team.
Diana.late_game: Both scale. Use stolen ults effectively.
Diana.win_condition: Steal her ult and use it in fights.
Diana.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Diana.positioning: Keep distance. Close when she overextends.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir has soldiers for poke. Trade when soldiers down.
Azir.early_game: Play defensively. Azir has decent early poke.
Azir.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Azir.win_condition: Steal his ult and use it.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves
Azir.positioning: Close distance with E. Avoid soldiers.

Tristana.trading_pattern: Tristana is weak early. Use E to close and trade.
Tristana.early_game: Abuse her weak early. Close with E.
Tristana.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let her scale.
Tristana.late_game: She outscales. Finish before she becomes oppressive.
Tristana.win_condition: Get early lead. Finish before ADC scaling.
Tristana.scaling: Tristana outscales — her ADC scaling dominates late
Tristana.positioning: Close with E early. Abuse her weakness.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is very weak early. Spam E and farm.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with E aggression. Farm freely.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.win_condition: Get early lead. Finish before 2-3 items.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead
Smolder.positioning: Use E aggressively early. Push him off farm.

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze has poke. Trade when cooldowns are down.
Ryze.ability_to_dodge: Ryze Q (Overload) — dodge back or sideways.
Ryze.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Ryze.late_game: He outscales slightly. Use stolen ults.
Ryze.win_condition: Steal his ult and use it.
Ryze.scaling: Ryze outscales — his teamfight control improves
Ryze.positioning: Keep distance with W. Close when safe.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has poke. Trade when ball is far.
Orianna.early_game: Trade when ball is away. Both scale.
Orianna.mid_game: Use ult to steal her ult. Scale with team.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Keep distance with W. Keep away from ball.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassiopeia has sustained poke. Trade carefully.
Cassiopeia.early_game: Play defensively. Cassio has decent poke.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Use ult to steal hers. Scale with team.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Steal her ult and use it.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage is overwhelming
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance. Close when safe. Avoid poison.

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has burst and mobility. Play defensive with W.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — back off when clones.
Zed.early_game: Play safe pre-6. Zed has strong burst.
Zed.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Zed.late_game: He outscales. Use stolen ults effectively.
Zed.win_condition: Steal and use his burst ult.
Zed.scaling: Zed slightly favored — his burst is higher
Zed.positioning: Keep distance with W. Never close to shadows.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is melee. Trade when his abilities are down.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: Malphite Q (Seismic Shard) — dodge by stepping away.
Malphite.mid_game: Use ult to steal his ult. Scale with team.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales with tankiness. Use stolen ults.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales — his tankiness increases late
Malphite.positioning: Keep distance with W. Close when safe.
